incident_report:
# Incident Report: Dungeon Agent Run (Seed 23)

**Summary:** This run exceeded the 50-turn limit without achieving any mission objectives, with Agent A and Agent B encountering persistent spurious block anomalies throughout the dungeon. The agents faced a critical pathfinding or navigation issue, with 10 anomalies triggered across 51 turns—primarily affecting Agent A (7 anomalies) starting as early as turn 3. Most notably, Agent A appeared to locate the exit and key at position [6,6] by turn 49, but despite sending three messages to Agent B attempting to coordinate a final convergence (turns 49-51), the agents failed to reach the locked door together before time expired.

**Key Decision Points:** The failure to unlock any doors or recover pickups suggests either (1) the agents were unable to navigate effectively through the spurious block anomalies despite repeated attempts, or (2) Agent A's late discovery of the exit position came too close to the turn limit to allow for successful rendezvous and exit execution. The agents did demonstrate basic communication capability (3 messages sent), but communication alone proved insufficient without adequate remaining turns for physical execution.
